REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2500-2510 Folsom Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Christine Witherspoon (Administrator).

Ms. Alavi stated the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $1,450,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $1,227,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (order for the same signed).

Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.

Avid Alavi stated the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $2,230,000.00. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). An additional bond in the amount of $2,040,000.00 is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
